intro: The reeds part around a crooked hut on stilts. An old woman watches you from the doorway, the mire breathing around her.
speaker: Bog Witch
introDialogue: The swamp takes its due from all who pass... but I can lift its rot from you. Leave me an appropriate offering, and we have a bargain. Skimp, and the mire will remember you.
title: The Bog Witch's Bargain
description: She names no price, only that the offering be "appropriate." Read her mood and decide what she is worth - the mire has a long memory for those who disappoint it.

1.label: Leave an offering
1.tooltip: (?) Offer one held item. Judge for yourself what will satisfy her - she will not say.
1.selected: You lay your offering in the witch's withered hands.

2.label: Refuse
2.tooltip: (-) Walk away from the mire. No offering, no boon, no curse.
2.selected: You decide the swamp can keep its bargains. You walk on.

invalidSelection: That Pokemon has nothing to offer.
blessed: The witch cackles, pleased. The rot lifts from your team, and she presses a warding charm into your hand.
cursed: The witch sneers at your stinginess and spits a hex into the mud. A lasting curse settles over {{cursedName}} - its {{cursedStat}} is sapped until the hex is cleansed.
